title: Reusable Django test databases and test acceleration guide
goal: Document and expose a no-coverage-loss workflow for faster repeated Django test runs.
requirements: Add a command that reuses existing Django test databases through the built-in test runner.
Keep full coverage available and avoid making selective test runs the only verification path.
Document safe acceleration techniques and unsafe shortcuts.
Record execution and acceptance in the existing testing workflow block.
acceptance: Makefile exposes a keepdb-based test target.
Project docs explain test database reuse and selective test scope.
Execution docs record commands, result and residual risks.
Generated project structure includes the new guide and workflow files.
